label: Source validation
description: Validate file count, size, names and prohibited content.

label: Dependency resolution
description: Resolve approved runtime dependencies inside the isolated job.

label: Compilation / build
description: Compile or prepare the project using the academy runtime.

label: Hidden tests
description: Run server-only assessment tests without exposing test source.

label: Static analysis
description: Run academy-specific quality and security checks.

label: Evidence generation
description: Create immutable submission evidence and integrity hash.
